page = product_name = 'HeadPhones' @allure.feature("Amazon Automation 1") @allure.story("End-to-End Flow") @pytest.mark.parametrize("product_name", ["laptop", "Mobile", "HeadPhones"]) def test_automation(page, product_name): with allure.step("Search Product"): searchs = SearchBar(page) searchs.search_bar(product_name) with allure.step("Apply filter"): filters = Filterspage(page) filters.sortbyprice() filters.ratings() filters.outofstock() filters.alldiscount() filters.payondelivery() filters.print_sorted_elements() with allure.step("Product"): product_obj = ProductPage(page) product_page = product_obj.random_product_selector() if product_page is None: pytest.skip("No product found") with allure.step("cart Action"): cart = CartPage(product_page) cart.add_to_cart() >
